title: template of an employment contract for a for a cleaner/housekeeper that complies with English/UK/British employment law …

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: template of an employment contract for a for a cleaner/housekeeper that complies with English/UK/British employment law and conditions.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Employment Contract for a Cleaner/Housekeeper

This contract of employment is between [Employer Name] (hereafter referred to as “Employer”) and [Employee Name] (hereafter referred to as “Employee”).

1. Job Title: Cleaner/Housekeeper

2. Commencement date of employment: [Insert date]

3. Hours of work: [Insert hours of work]

4. Wage: [Insert wage]

5. Place of work: [Insert place of work]

6. Duties and responsibilities:

The employee agrees to perform the following duties and responsibilities:

a. Cleaning and maintaining the Employer’s property

b. Sweeping, dusting, mopping and vacuuming floors

c. Washing dishes and cleaning kitchen surfaces

d. Cleaning bathrooms, toilets, and bedrooms

e. Laundry and ironing clothes

f. Running errands when required

7. Probationary period:

The employee’s employment will be subject to a probationary period of [Insert duration]. During this period, either party may terminate the agreement by giving [Insert notice period] notice in writing.

8. Termination of employment:

Either party may terminate this agreement at any time by giving [Insert notice period] notice in writing.

9. Working hours:

The employee’s working hours will be [Insert hours of work] per week. The employer reserves the right to change the working hours with reasonable notice.

10. Pay:

The employee will be paid [Insert wage] per hour/per week/per month. Payment will be made on [Insert payment frequency] basis.

11. Holidays:

The employee is entitled to [Insert holiday entitlement] holidays per annum. Holiday must be taken at a time agreed with the employer.

12. Sick leave:

If the employee is unable to work due to sickness or injury, the employee must inform the employer as soon as possible. The employee will be entitled to [Insert sick pay] pay per day of sickness.

13. Notice of absence:

The employee must notify the employer as soon as possible if he or she is unable to attend work due to unavoidable delays or circumstances.

14. Confidentiality:

The employee agrees to maintain strict confidentiality about all business-related matters concerning the Employer and its clients.

15. Health and safety:

The employee agrees to comply with all health and safety policies and procedures of the Employer.

16. Non-compete:

The employee agrees not to work for or be associated in any capacity with any competitor of the Employer for [Insert time period] after the end of this agreement.

17. Entire agreement:

This contract of employment contains the entire agreement between the parties and supersedes all prior or contemporaneous oral or written agreements or understandings between them.

18. Governing law and jurisdiction:

This contract of employment shall be governed by English law and any dispute arising out of or in connection with this contract of employment shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the English courts.

Signed by the Employer _______________________

Signed by the Employee _______________________ 

[date]

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: benefits document with text and pictures that includes things like bonus, pension, health care for a for a cleaner/housekeeper working for a small boutique bed and breakfast in a village in Wiltshire.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Employee Benefits for Cleaners/Housekeepers - Small Boutique Bed and Breakfast

At [Bed and Breakfast Name], we value our employees and strive to provide them with the best possible working conditions and benefits. As a Cleaner/Housekeeper at our small boutique Bed and Breakfast in a picturesque village in Wiltshire, you can enjoy the following benefits:

1. Competitive Salary

We offer a competitive salary for cleaners/housekeepers. In addition, you may be eligible for bonuses based on your performance.

2. Pension Scheme

We provide our cleaners/housekeepers with a pension scheme that allows you to save for your future retirement. Our pension scheme has been designed to provide you with a comfortable retirement in the years to come.

3. Healthcare

We understand the importance of healthcare, which is why we offer our employees a comprehensive healthcare package. This includes access to private healthcare services, dental care, eye care, and other benefits.

4. Personal Development

We believe in personal development and offer our cleaners/housekeepers training opportunities to help you develop your skills and take on new challenges. We offer training on a variety of subjects, including customer service, time management, and cleaning techniques.

5. Flexible Working Hours

We know that life can be busy, so we offer flexible working hours to our employees. This allows you to balance your personal life with your work commitments and responsibilities.

6. Employee Perks

We offer our employees various perks, including free breakfast and discounted rates to stay at our Bed and Breakfast. We also offer opportunities to attend industry events and training courses.

7. Positive Work Environment

Our Bed and Breakfast is a small, family-owned business with a positive and friendly work environment. We value teamwork, respect, and cooperation and truly believe in taking care of our employees.

Why Work with Us?

At [Bed and Breakfast Name], we strive to create a work environment where our employees feel valued and appreciated. Our cleaners/housekeepers are an essential part of our team, and we provide them with the support and resources they need to succeed.

We are located in a picturesque village in Wiltshire with easy access to local amenities. Our Bed and Breakfast is a small, family-run business that values teamwork and respect. We offer a competitive salary, employee benefits, and the opportunity to learn and grow within your role.

Join our team today and enjoy the benefits of working at a small, boutique Bed and Breakfast in a picturesque location.
